Title: Path traversal in vite-plus/binding downloadPackageManager() writes outside VP_HOME
Description: `downloadPackageManager()` in `vite-plus/binding` accepts an untrusted `version` string and uses it directly in filesystem paths. A caller can supply `../` segments to escape the `VP_HOME/package_manager/<pm>/` cache root and cause Vite+ to delete, replace, and populate directories outside the intended cache location.
